title: 3 Strategies to Create Passive Income

segments.text: Passive income is the key to financial freedom.
But most stop at the idea instead of acting.
Invest in assets that generate cash flow over time.
Building a business can be a source of income.
And leverage your skills for royalties or licensing.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Learn how to make your money work for you. Follow for daily money wisdom! 💰
